name: @open-cowork/standalone-gateway
description: Standalone Open Cowork Gateway execution appliance with private OpenCode and Postgres

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-telegram build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-testing build && tsc
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-channel build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-telegram build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-provider-webhook build && corepack pnpm --filter @open-cowork/gateway-testing build && tsc --noEmit
